subcodes.first_line: O thou who art guided by the morn of true guidance! When the radiant dawn from the horizon of Shíráz shed forth its effulgent rays across all horizons, glad tidings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتدی بصبح هدی فجر ساطع چون از افق شیراز بارقه اش منتشر در آفاق گشت بشارت
subcodes.subjects: @East and West; communication between East and West, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @call to action
